_meta.purpose: Empirical dataset-retention holding index (decision #22). Written by m_26_14-dataset-retention transform; one doc per data_stream.dataset value. Serves two purposes: (1) enrich source for m_26_14-observed-enrich-based retention lookups in Stage 1; (2) source for the m_26_14-score-dataset-retention transform which projects per-dataset retention score docs into m_26_14-scores. Key field: horizon_days = (ingest_time - min(@timestamp)) / 86400000 -- the empirical searchable horizon. Replaces ILM/tier/snapshot introspection (old fetch_retention in score.py). The snapshot/'retrievable' axis is dropped; a single empirical axis is used and fed to both s_days and r_days in retention_level(). After re-running the transform or fresh data, re-execute the m_26_14-retention-enrich policy to refresh the snapshot.
